changeSet.author: ahri-inventory

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'clinlims' AND table_name = 'inventory_item' AND column_name = 'analyzer_id' AND udt_name IN ('varchar', 'text')

changeSet.comment: Align optional inventory analyzer link column with analyzer.id type.

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE constraint_schema = 'clinlims' AND constraint_name = 'fk_inventory_item_analyzer'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns base_col JOIN information_schema.columns ref_col ON ref_col.table_schema = 'clinlims' AND ref_col.table_name = 'analyzer' AND ref_col.column_name = 'id' WHERE base_col.table_schema = 'clinlims' AND base_col.table_name = 'inventory_item' AND base_col.column_name = 'analyzer_id' AND base_col.udt_name = ref_col.udt_name
